summarization.a: The line chart illustrates the growth rate of a material in Å per cycle as a function of TiF pulse length in seconds. The growth rate increases with increasing pulse length but it slightly decreases at 2 s.

a.question: Can the saturation of the growth rate be observed?
What is the effect of varying the TiF4 pulse length on the growth rate?
a.answer: The growth rate increases almost linearly with the length of the TiF4 pulse, but decreases slightly at 2s.

a.question: Which TiF4 pulse length has the lowest growth rate?
Can the saturation growth be determined as a function of the TiF4 pulse length?
a.answer: No for this case, because the growth rate doesn't remain constant.
